nmaprun.args: /usr/lib/nmap/nmap --privileged -vv --reason -Pn -T4 -sV -p 389 "--script=banner,(ldap* or ssl*) and not (brute or broadcast or dos or external or fuzzer)" -oN "/home/noah/Desktop/New Folder/obsidian-OSCP/OSCP-Obs/Notion/THM/Enterprise/results/10.114.191.140/scans/tcp389/tcp_389_ldap_nmap.txt" -oX "/home/noah/Desktop/New Folder/obsidian-OSCP/OSCP-Obs/Notion/THM/Enterprise/results/10.114.191.140/scans/tcp389/xml/tcp_389_ldap_nmap.xml" 10.114.191.140
